avoidSaying: the people who studies every day
sentencePatterns: People who ... are more likely to ...
realLifeExamples: People who study every day improve faster.
usageNotes: Use people who study, not people who studies. Use every day as two words when it means each day.
productionPrompts: 用 People who ... improve faster. 写一句关于学习习惯的英文。
